question: James has 43 magnets. Sarah has 39 magnets. How many magnets do they have altogether?
Priya had 66 magnets. Priya gave 48 magnets to Li. How many magnets does Priya have left?
Elena has 9 shelves of books. Each shelf contains 5 books. How many books does Elena have in total?
Sarah has 44 books to divide equally among 4 friends. How many books does each friend receive?
Ravi has 32 candies. Sarah has 5 times as many candies as Ravi. Sarah gives 6 candies to each of 5 friends. How many candies does Sarah have left?
Kenji buys 2 cards at $4 each and pays with $13. How much change does Kenji receive?
A train travels at 60 miles per hour for 6 hours. How many miles does it travel?
Li makes 13 stickers every hour. How many stickers does Li make in 2 hours?
Maria has 100 books and gives 60% of them to Marcus. How many books does Maria have left?

Amara buys 8 packs of apples, with 9 apples in each pack. Amara gives 2 apples to each of 5 friends, and Aisha gives Amara an extra 2 apples. How many apples does Amara have after sharing but before Aisha's gift?
Elena has 87 stamps. Yuki has 54 stamps. How many stamps do they have altogether?
Kenji had 57 magnets. Kenji gave 7 magnets to Carlos. How many magnets does Kenji have left?
Priya has 6 boxes of cards. Each box contains 7 cards. How many cards does Priya have in total?
Marcus has 90 cards to divide equally among 6 friends. How many cards does each friend receive?
Ana has 33 coins. Olivia has 4 times as many coins as Ana. Olivia gives 4 coins to each of 6 friends. How many coins does Olivia have left?
Ana buys 5 candies at $4 each and pays with $28. How much change does Ana receive?
A train travels at 65 miles per hour for 6 hours. How many miles does it travel?
Elena makes 13 stickers every hour. How many stickers does Elena make in 8 hours?
Tom has 120 apples and gives 60% of them to Priya. How many apples does Tom have left?

Aisha buys 7 packs of stickers, with 11 stickers in each pack. Aisha gives 4 stickers to each of 3 friends, and Maria gives Aisha an extra 7 stickers. How many stickers does Aisha have after sharing but before Maria's gift?
